TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Bill_Allen, title = Bill_Allen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bill_Allen} }

S.FORM: Bill Allen sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1945, Bill Allen, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
Bill Allen sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1945, Bill Allen, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: βill allen s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, βill allen, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
